title: Value becomes undefined in Code node
symptom: The output of a workflow shows that a property is 'undefined', even though it exists in the input data.
root_cause: When using a Code node, the reference to the order of each item may be lost, leading to properties being undefined. This can happen if the code does not properly maintain item identifiers or if the node is set to process items in a way that does not preserve their context.
fix_steps: Change the Code node settings to 'Run once for each item'
Ensure that each item has a unique identifier that is preserved throughout the workflow
agent_instruction: Adjust the Code node to run for each item individually and maintain item identifiers.
